meaning: n.管,管子,[英] 地铁,<美> 电子管,显象管
examples: I work in the extruded tube business.
Stop up the other end of the tube, will you?
I went out today and bought a tube of toothpaste.
Could something as dumb and as mechanical as a robotic test tube compete with old-fashioned ingenuity?
Sits for weeks surrounded by sandbags and a big inner tube during a 2011 flood.
